title: Stara Zagora、Stara Zagora — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Stara Zagora、Stara Zagoraの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

Stara ZagoraはStara Zagoraにある人口136,363の都市です。A city in central Bulgaria with a history spanning 8,000 years, known for its Neolithic dwellings, the Samara Flag Monument, and the beautiful Ayazmo Park.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
